records.question: Which departments that have member_of records, course records, and minor_in records have the division exactly equal to 'EN', the department name exactly equal to 'Mathematical Sciences', and offer a course exactly named 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' with hours equal to 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE course.hours = '11' AND department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND course.cname = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' AND department.division = 'EN'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dno
FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.division = 'EN'
  AND department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences'
  AND course.cname = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS'
  AND course.hours = '11'

  AND member_of.appt_type = 'Primary'

records.question: What departments named Mathematical Sciences are in the EN division and Maryland building, have a phone number of at least 7195, and offer courses on MTW taught by faculty named Shih-Ping?

JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN faculty ON course.instructor = faculty.facid
WHERE department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND faculty.fname = 'Shih-Ping' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.building = 'Maryland' AND department.dphone >= 7195 AND course.days = 'MTW'

JOIN faculty ON course.instructor = faculty.facid

  AND department.building = 'Maryland'
  AND department.dphone >= 7195
  AND course.days = 'MTW'
  AND faculty.fname = 'Shih-Ping'

JOIN student ON department.dno = student.major
WHERE department.dphone >= 7119 AND student.fname = 'Andy' AND student.lname = 'Schultz'

records.question: What department has the name exactly History of Science?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
WHERE department.dname = 'History of Science'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DNO FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DName = 'History of Science'

records.question: Which departments located in building NEB with the name Computer Science and phone number 8577 have related member_of records and offer courses named INTRO TO PROGRAMMING IN C/C++ held on MTW at hour 12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE department.building = 'NEB' AND department.dname = 'Computer Science' AND course.cname = 'INTRO TO PROGRAMMING IN C/C++' AND department.dphone = 8577 AND course.days = 'MTW' AND course.hours = '12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dno
FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE department.building = 'NEB'
  AND department.dname = 'Computer Science'
  AND department.dphone = 8577
  AND course.cname = 'INTRO TO PROGRAMMING IN C/C++'
  AND course.days = 'MTW'
  AND course.hours = '12'

records.question: What departments have faculty with a primary appointment who teach courses on MT in the Krieger building, have phone number 2032, and whose courses have at most 4 credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN faculty ON member_of.facid = faculty.facid
JOIN course ON faculty.facid = course.instructor
WHERE member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND course.days = 'MT' AND faculty.phone = 2032 AND faculty.building = 'Krieger' AND course.credits <= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.DNO
FROM Department d
JOIN Member_of m ON d.DNO = m.DNO
JOIN Faculty f ON m.FacID = f.FacID
JOIN Course c ON f.FacID = c.Instructor
WHERE m.Appt_Type = 'primary'
  AND c.Days = 'MT'
  AND f.Building = 'Krieger'
  AND f.DPhone = 2032
  AND c.Credits <= 4

records.question: Which departments in the EN division have members with a Primary appointment and also offer courses and minors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND department.division = 'EN'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DNO
FROM Member_of
JOIN Department ON Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO
WHERE Division = 'EN' AND Appt_Type = 'Primary'
INTERSECT
SELECT DNO
FROM Course
INTERSECT
SELECT DNO
FROM Minor_in

records.question: Which departments are located in building Krieger, division AS, room 381, have a department phone number at most 7119, and include faculty member Salzberg with a phone number at most 2641 who has a Secondary appointment?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN faculty ON member_of.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE department.building = 'Krieger' AND department.division = 'AS' AND department.room = '381' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Secondary' AND faculty.phone <= 2641 AND faculty.lname = 'Salzberg' AND department.dphone <= 7119

SELECT DNO
FROM Department
WHERE Building = 'Krieger' AND Division = 'AS' AND Room = '381' AND DPhone <= 7119
INTERSECT
SELECT DNO
FROM Member_of
JOIN Faculty ON Member_of.FacID = Faculty.FacID
WHERE Faculty.Lname = 'Salzberg' AND Faculty.Phone <= 2641 AND Appt_Type = 'Secondary'

records.question: Which departments that have related member_of and course records have the division exactly equal to 'EN', a phone number at least 7195, are located in the building 'Maryland', have the name exactly 'Mathematical Sciences', and also have courses with the name exactly 'COMBINATORIAL ANALYSIS' held on 'MTW' days and with at most 3 credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE course.days = 'MTW' AND course.credits <= 3 AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.dphone >= 7195 AND department.building = 'Maryland' AND course.cname = 'COMBINATORIAL ANALYSIS' AND department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DNO
FROM DEPARTMENT
JOIN MEMBER_OF ON DEPARTMENT.DNO = MEMBER_OF.DNO
JOIN COURSE ON DEPARTMENT.DNO = COURSE.DNO
WHERE DEPARTMENT.Division = 'EN'
  AND DEPARTMENT.DPhone >= 7195
  AND DEPARTMENT.Building = 'Maryland'
  AND DEPARTMENT.DName = 'Mathematical Sciences'
  AND COURSE.CName = 'COMBINATORIAL ANALYSIS'
  AND COURSE.Days = 'MTW'
  AND COURSE.Credits <= 3
